prohibited_claim: source note means claim is verified
allowed_wording: A source note records controlled source-use guidance; claim verification still requires claim-level evidence review.

prohibited_claim: source note means OBC or FBC evidence is complete
allowed_wording: The Stage 14A pilot helps future OBC/FBC drafting but does not complete business-case evidence dependencies.
Legal claims require real legal review and cannot rely on a simulation source note alone.
The source-note backlog remains controlled open until every acquired priority source has a reviewed note.

prohibited_claim: source note means source is current
allowed_wording: Currentness must be rechecked before real-world reliance or publication.
